title: Sauroglossum andinum

It belongs to the genus Sauroglossum, which is a group of terrestrial orchids found in the Andes mountain range. The classification of Sauroglossum andinum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Tracheophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, genus Sauroglossum, species S. andinum.
